name: Production Crawl, Rendered Head, Schema, And Browser Matrix

liveHttpSummary.rootCause: Production is serving a Figma Make generic SPA shell and is not serving the repo static SEO assets, edge redirects, protected route policy, or real error statuses.

browserRenderedMatrix.releaseBlocker: HTTP response is 200 with index,follow in raw HTML. Private routes need edge status/header policy, not only client-side not-found UI.

rendered.title: Sivua ei loytynyt | Mitra Auto
rendered.h1: Tama auto taisi ajaa vaaraan risteykseen.

browserRenderedMatrix.releaseBlocker: HTTP response is 200 instead of 404 or 410.

console.warningSummary: Repeated preload warning for https://www.mitra-auto.fi/_json/.../_index.json not used shortly after load.

findings.title: Production static SEO assets and Merchant feed are not deployed or routed correctly.
findings.evidence: robots.txt and sitemap.xml return 404; sitemap-products.xml, sitemap-products-1.xml, and merchant-products.xml return text/html SPA shell instead of XML/RSS.
findings.verification: Fetch each URL and require expected status, MIME, and body root element.

findings.title: Public raw HTML is a generic JavaScript shell.
findings.evidence: Sampled indexable pages return a generic Figma Make title, no raw canonical, no raw page-specific JSON-LD, and a noscript JavaScript-required state.
findings.verification: curl raw HTML and parse title, description, canonical, robots, hreflang, H1 marker, anchors, and JSON-LD before hydration.

findings.title: Private, checkout, and error routes are wrong at HTTP/indexability layer.
findings.evidence: /cms, /checkout, random unknown route, and unknown product route return HTTP 200 generic raw HTML with index,follow instead of noindex/error/private policy.
findings.verification: curl status and X-Robots/meta robots before browser hydration.

findings.title: Legacy redirects and product identifier redirects are inactive on production.
findings.evidence: /shop, /palvelut/dpf-pesu, product UUID, and product GTIN samples return 200 with no Location header.
findings.verification: curl with redirects disabled and require one-hop permanent redirect to canonical slug or route.

findings.title: Rendered pages hydrate with route-specific metadata and schema, but this does not clear raw HTTP blockers.
findings.evidence: Playwright rendered homepage, DPF service page, and product slug page with route-specific head data and JSON-LD; console showed no errors and one preload warning class.
findings.verification: Keep browser matrix, but require raw HTTP parity before release-ready classification.

localGateComparison.interpretation: Local repo contracts exist. Production does not appear to be serving the repo build plus route policy.

driftComparison.result: No meaningful remediation observed. The same production classes remain: missing static SEO assets, HTML sitemaps/feed, inactive redirects, HTTP 200 private/error routes, and generic raw SPA shell.

next: E-3 - Accessibility, SXO, Checkout, And Customer Journey Smoke
releaseDecision: E-2 is complete as evidence collection. Mitra Auto remains not release-ready and not growth-ready until production serves repo static assets, edge redirects, route status policy, private route boundary, and raw SEO metadata/schema.
